data.title: Jupiter Lianchuang: No interest in LIBRA and other projects
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Jupiter co-founder Siong posted on the X platform that "Jupiter has not joined forces with projects such as LIBRA and ENRON to do evil. We have no direct financial interests in these projects."

data.title: Brian Quintenz Nominated As CFTC Chair By U.S. President Donald Trump
data.description:
According to PANews, Chris Dixon, managing partner at a16z Crypto, announced on the X platform that Brian Quintenz has been with a16z Crypto for over three years. Initially serving as a senior advisor and later as the head of policy, Quintenz's expertise is considered invaluable to the cryptocurrency industry. Dixon expressed confidence in Quintenz's potential to excel as the Chairman of the U.S. Commodity Futures Trading Commission (CFTC).

Previously, it was reported that U.S. President Donald Trump has nominated Brian Quintenz to serve as the next Chairman of the CFTC.

data.title: Binance Market Update (2025-02-16)
data.description:
The global cryptocurrency market cap now stands at $3.24T, up by 0.30% over the last day, according to CoinMarketCap data.

Bitcoin (BTC) has been trading between $97,062 and $97,963 over the past 24 hours. As of 09:30 AM (UTC) today, BTC is trading at $97,185, down by -0.28%.

Most major cryptocurrencies by market cap are trading mixed. Market outperformers include GLM, ID, and ELF, up by 56%, 21%, and 14%, respectively.

Top stories of the day:

BNB Chain Accumulates $15 Million in Gas Fees Over 7 Days, Second Only to Solana

Pro-Bitcoin and Digital Asset Policies Expand Across 30+ U.S. States in 2025: Co-Founder of SAF

Strategy Eyes S&P 500 Inclusion Amid Bitcoin Valuation Changes

Michael Saylor: STRK Emerges as Top Performer in Initial Trading Weeks

BNB Chain Launches $4.4M Liquidity Pool Support Program for Top Memecoins – Round 1

data.title: U.S. Markets to Close for Presidents' Day
data.description: According to PANews, U.S. financial markets will be closed on February 17 in observance of Presidents' Day. As a result, trading for precious metals and U.S. crude oil futures on the CME will conclude earlier than usual, ending at 03:30 UTC+8 on February 18. Additionally, stock index futures trading will close at 02:00 UTC+8 on the same day.

data.title: US stocks will be closed for one day next Monday, and CME futures contract trading will end early
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Due to the President's Day, the U.S. stock market will be closed for one day on February 17 (Monday). CME's precious metals and U.S. crude oil futures contract trading will end ahead of schedule at 03:30 on the 18th Beijing time, and stock index futures contract trading will end ahead of schedule at 02:00 on the 18th Beijing time. (Jinshi)

data.title: Review of Berachain: Empowering DeFi Liquidity
data.description:
Liquidity fragmentation in the DeFi sector and the lack of clear incentives for developers remain structural challenges for the cryptocurrency industry. Berachain is a Layer 1 (L1) blockchain that introduces the Proof-of-Liquidity (PoL) consensus and a modular architecture designed to redefine liquidity management and security in the DeFi industry. Through a design that combines full ... 
source: https://crypto-economy.com/berachain/

data.description:
RLUSD's total supply soars to hit $120 million as XRPL holdings hit 37.5 million.

data.title: Stablecoin Market Cap Reaches $225.28 Billion
data.description: According to BlockBeats, data from DefiLlama indicates that the total market capitalization of stablecoins in the cryptocurrency market has reached $225.28 billion as of February 16. Over the past seven days, the market cap has increased by $1.23 billion, marking a week-on-week growth of 0.55%. Among the stablecoins, USDT holds a dominant market share of 63.22%.

data.title: Over 7,100 BTC flowed into Bitfinex exchange wallet in the past 7 days
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to Coinglass data, 7102.08 bitcoins flowed into the Bitfinex exchange in the past week, 172.54 bitcoins flowed out of the Binance wallet in the past 7 days, and 463.03 bitcoins flowed out of the OKX wallet in the past 7 days.
